description: DB engine = MySQL. Reuses the outbox+idempotency arch to exercise the MySQL SQL dialect: build.gradle (mysql-connector-j + flyway-mysql), application*.yaml (MySQLDialect + jdbc:mysql URL), JPA columnDefinition (LONGTEXT text, omitted uuid columnDefinition), and the V1 reliability Flyway migration DDL (CHAR(36)/LONGTEXT/DATETIME/TINYINT(1), plain CREATE INDEX). First golden parametrized by DB engine — validates MySQL support end to end.
